query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "molmomotion: forecasting point trajectories in 3d with language instru" computer science
rationale: The paper focuses on click-through rate (CTR) prediction in recommender systems using multimodal embeddings, which is a distinct domain and mechanism from the user's question about 3D point trajectory forecasting with language instructions. It fails to satisfy any inclusion criteria (a-f) as it does not measure the same biological/physical/algorithmic mechanism, share variables in the same domain, or serve as a foundational reference for 3D motion forecasting.
